title: phaca campestris var. sordida
intro: Phaca campestris var. sordida, also known as a variety of the purple prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Phaca campestris var. sordida include its ability to soothe inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
